sp_widget.name: DMM Migration History
sp_widget.template:
Migration History

View and manage past migration runs

All migration executions

{{c.stats.success}}
Completed successfully

{{c.stats.partial}}
Completed with issues
Failed
{{c.stats.failed}}
Migration failed

Migration Runs ({{c.filteredRuns().length}})

Migration ID Tables Records Fetched Records Inserted Records Updated Status Duration Date & Time Actions

Contents

{{t}}
